name: Coffee Can Cookery
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the carrot in half lengthwise.
2. Cut the celery and carrot into 2-inch lengths.
3. Cut the bacon in half.
4. Mold 2 meat patties.
5. Place 2 pieces of bacon on the bottom of the can.
6. Layer all ingredients evenly.
7. Repeat layering with remaining ingredients.
8. Place the closed coffee can on top of glowing coals for 25 minutes.
9. Open the lid and check after 10 minutes. If browning occurs too rapidly, pour 2 tablespoons of water into the can.
